title: selaginella bombycina
intro: Selaginella bombycina, also known as the 'Silky Clubmoss', is a type of spore-producing plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella bombycina include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and aid in digestion, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, Selaginella bombycina is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-arthritic properties.
